# BrandOS System Inventory (Generated)

---

## Platform Summary

BrandOS is an AI-powered brand content generation platform. It accepts user generation
requests (carousel, deck, report, text), resolves brand identity from learned memory
signals, orchestrates LLM calls through a multi-provider runtime, compiles raw LLM
output into canonical typed artifacts, validates artifacts against governance policy
before delivery, and accumulates brand signals from scored outputs to improve
personalisation over time.

## Brand Intelligence

| Component | Table | Role |
|---|---|---|
| Memory store | `brand_memory_entries` | Learned brand signals, classified and decay-tracked |
| Identity signals | `identity_signals` | Per-dimension weighted confidence signals |
| Identity versions | `identity_versions` | Snapshot history of resolved brand identity |

Owner: **`@brandos/brand-intelligence`** (L6)
Consumer access: CPL proxy functions only (Rule 8)

## Runtime Configuration

| Component | Table | Role |
|---|---|---|
| Provider credentials | `brandos_provider_credentials` | Encrypted API keys per provider |

| Admin settings | `brandos_admin_settings` | Platform-level config (jsonb blob) |
| Workspace settings | `workspace_settings` | Per-workspace runtime overrides |

Owner: **`@brandos/control-plane-layer`** (L7)

## Governance

| Component | Table | Role |
|---|---|---|
| Audit log | `brandos_governance_audit` | Immutable record of every governance evaluation |
| Approvals | `brandos_artifact_approvals` | Human-in-the-loop approval workflow |
| Versions | `brandos_artifact_versions` | Versioned artifact stamps per request |

Pass threshold: **65** ¬∑ Approval threshold: **70**
Owner: **`@brandos/control-plane-layer`** (orchestration) + **`@brandos/governance-layer`** (scoring)

## Architectural Boundaries (Quick Reference)

| Rule | One-line summary |
|---|---|
| RULE-1 | `apps/web` ‚Üí no `@brandos/brand-intelligence` ‚Äî use CPL proxies |
| RULE-2 | `@brandos/output-control-layer` ‚Üí no `@brandos/brand-intelligence` |
| RULE-3 | `@brandos/control-plane-layer` ‚Üí BI allowlist symbols only |
| RULE-4 | `@brandos/ai-runtime-layer` ‚Üí no `@brandos/output-control-layer` |
| RULE-5 | `@brandos/governance-layer` ‚Üí no `@brandos/output-control-layer` |
| RULE-6 | CPL ‚Üí no concrete BI repo classes (use factory) |
| RULE-7 | CPL ‚Üí no BrandIntelligenceRuntime concrete class (use factory) |
| OCL-GC | `@brandos/output-control-layer` ‚Üí no `@brandos/governance-config` |
| PL-AUTH | `@brandos/presentation-layer` ‚Üí no auth re-exports from index.ts |
| ROUTES | Route files ‚Üí forbidden: `@brandos/governance-layer`, `@brandos/ai-runtime-layer`, `@brandos/output-control-layer`, `@brandos/artifact-engine-layer`, `@brandos/iskill-runtime`, `@brandos/brand-intelligence` |

---

## Generation Entry Point

```
apps/web API route
  ‚Üí runControlPlane(request)           [@brandos/control-plane-layer]
    ‚Üí CPLOrchestrator.orchestrate()
      ‚Üí resolveBrandCognitionContext()  [CPL proxy ‚Üí BI]
      ‚Üí ContractAssemblerFactory        [@brandos/output-control-layer]
      ‚Üí compilePromptFromContract()     [@brandos/output-control-layer]
      ‚Üí callWithMode()                  [@brandos/ai-runtime-layer]
      ‚Üí executeArtifactPipeline()       [@brandos/artifact-engine-layer]  (structured only)
  ‚Üí recordBrandMemoryObservation()     [CPL proxy ‚Üí BI, fire-and-forget]
```
